items.name: Dr Elizabeth Farrant
items.bio: Elizabeth leads New Path Molecular's strategy, business development, and fundraising. Previously Director of Chemical Technologies and Analytical Sciences at Pfizer, she co-founded New Path to translate the PS-targeting platform into first-in-class oncology therapeutics.

items.name: Dr Nikzad Nikbin
items.bio: Nikzad leads the scientific and technical development of New Path's synthetic PDC platform, overseeing chemistry, candidate selection, and preclinical programmes. He previously worked as a Research Associate in Prof. Ley's Innovative Technology Centre at the University of Cambridge.

items.name: Prof Steve Ley
items.bio: Steve is one of the world's leading synthetic chemists and BP (1702) Professor of Chemistry at the University of Cambridge. A founding scientific advisor to New Path Molecular, he provides foundational expertise in complex molecule synthesis.
